summary: Backend testing for minutes router migration completed successfully. All 39 tests passed. The minutes endpoints have been migrated from server.py (lines 3083-3088 contain migration comment) to routers/minutes.py (1243 lines). Router includes basic minutes CRUD, PDF generation, and 11 template types for document generation.
passed_tests: TestMinutesCRUD::test_create_minutes_returns_correct_response - POST /api/minutes creates record with correct structure
TestMinutesPDF::test_get_minutes_pdf - GET /api/minutes/{id}/pdf generates PDF with base64 content
TestMinutesTemplates::test_get_template_options - Returns 11 template types with correct structure
TestMinutesTemplates::test_get_template_options_with_trust_filter - Filters benevolence based on trust settings
critical_code_review_comments: Router correctly uses get_current_user for read operations and require_write_access for write operations (POST/PUT/DELETE)
MongoDB _id is properly excluded using {'_id': 0} projection in all queries

11 template types available: blank, general_meeting, distribution_to_beneficiaries, acceptance_of_property, disposition_of_asset, appointment_additional_trustee, appointment_successor_trustee, designation_of_beneficiaries, bank_account_authorization, change_of_situs, benevolence_approval
Template-based minutes store both generated_document and original_document for audit trail
PDF generation uses reportlab with proper styling and optional watermark based on subscription
Schedule A integration: acceptance_of_property can add assets, disposition_of_asset can mark assets as disposed
Router is properly included in server.py at line 5423 with prefix '/api'
Migration comment present at server.py lines 3083-3088
seed_data_creation: None - used existing demo data. Tests create and delete own test data with TEST_ prefix
context_for_next_testing_agent: Minutes router fully tested. All endpoints working: GET/POST /api/minutes (basic CRUD), GET/DELETE /api/minutes/{id}, GET /api/minutes/{id}/pdf (PDF generation), GET/POST/PUT/DELETE /api/minutes-templates (template-based minutes), GET /api/template-options (11 template types). Write operations (POST, PUT, DELETE) use require_write_access for subscription gating. Template types include: blank, general_meeting, distribution_to_beneficiaries, acceptance_of_property, disposition_of_asset, appointment_additional_trustee, appointment_successor_trustee, designation_of_beneficiaries, bank_account_authorization, change_of_situs, benevolence_approval.
